response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished full-stack engineer, but the profile does not match this role's core requirements. C++ experience is limited to a short stint at National Instruments (2014–2015) and a thesis project — far from the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience (MongoDB/MySQL instead), and no Fixed Income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain background; RIDE Capital was retail investment tooling, not investment banking systems.
strengths: Broad, senior-level engineering experience across web, backend, and embedded systems
Strong software craftsmanship practices: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic data integration)
concerns: No substantial or recent C++ experience, and none on the Windows platform
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No Fixed Income, capital markets, or investment banking domain expertise

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain experience
Strong general engineering and CI/CD fundamentals
